meaning: adj.马嘶声vi.嘶,叫vt.以嘶声表示
examples: With a terrified whinny the horse bolted.
It ended with a whinny that sounded very like a sigh.
To utter the characteristic sound of a horse; whinny.
We conquered the 15% grade of the treacherous Via Mala (literally, "bad road"), set in a narrow gorge pockmarked by fallen boulders, without so much as a whinny.
Patty had a loud, involuntary, whinny-like laugh.
